name: Missouri Electric Cooperatives Empl
description_short: MECE Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving electric cooperative employees and their families since 1975, offering savings accounts, mortgages, and lending products.
description_long:
MECE Credit Union was established in 1975 to serve employees of electric cooperatives across Missouri and surrounding regions. As a not-for-profit, member-owned institution insured by the NCUA, it operates on a cooperative model where members are owners rather than customers of a traditional bank. The credit union has built a membership base exceeding 13,000 members and manages significant assets, though exact figures are not displayed on their website.

The institution offers a range of financial products and services tailored to its membership base. Core offerings include share savings accounts, share certificates (CDs), mortgage lending with dedicated application processes, contactless debit cards, and consumer loan products through their dedicated loan department. Their website emphasizes personal service and member relationship management, positioning accessibility and member support as key operational principles.

MECE Credit Union distinguishes itself through its specialized focus on electric cooperative employees and their families, creating a niche community-oriented financial institution. Member testimonials on their website highlight staff friendliness, personalized service, and willingness to assist with individual financial needs. The credit union maintains multiple contact channels including phone (573-634-2595), dedicated loan department line (573-659-3420), email, and fax, suggesting emphasis on member accessibility.

As a credit union, MECE offers the typical advantages of member-ownership including potential for better rates and lower fees compared to traditional banks. However, membership eligibility is restricted to electric cooperative employees and affiliates, limiting accessibility to the general public. The website provides limited detailed information about specific product terms, rates, or fees, requiring direct contact for pricing and eligibility verification.
pros: Member-owned cooperative structure potentially offering better rates and lower fees than traditional banks
Established 50+ year track record serving electric cooperative employees since 1975
Mortgage lending services with dedicated loan department and streamlined application process
Contactless card technology available for members seeking modern payment security
Multiple contact channels including dedicated loan department phone line (573-659-3420)
Positive member testimonials emphasizing personalized, family-like service quality
NCUA insurance protection on deposits up to standard limits
cons: Membership restricted to electric cooperative employees and affiliated individuals—not open to general public
Limited transparency on website regarding specific interest rates, fees, or product terms
Minimal product detail provided online; requires direct contact for most loan and account information
No mention of digital banking features beyond online/mobile login capabilities
Website shows placeholder values for asset size and member count rather than actual figures
best_for: Electric cooperative employees and their families seeking member-owned financial services
Members needing mortgage financing with personalized service and relationship-focused approach
Electric cooperative retirees and dependents eligible for membership seeking savings products
diagnosis: MECE Credit Union is best suited for employees of Missouri electric cooperatives and their families seeking member-owned financial services with personalized service. The primary caveat is membership eligibility restriction—applicants must be affiliated with participating electric cooperatives, making it inaccessible to the general public.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Missouri Electric Cooperatives Empl (Jefferson City, MO) |.
meta_description: Missouri Electric Cooperatives Empl — NCUA-insured credit union in Jefferson City, MO. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
